name: libhtml-html5-entities-perl
title: libhtml-html5-entities-perl
summary: module to encode and decode character entities defined in HTML5
description:
module to encode and decode character entities defined in HTML5
HTML::HTML5::Entities is a drop-in replacement for HTML::Entities,
providing the character entities defined in HTML5. It is a pure Perl
implementation and hence slower, especially decoding.
